why: CHART: breakout of the morning 7108-7127 range to new session highs at 7127.7 (96% of range), HH forming, momentum accelerating positive (5m +0.07%, 15m +0.12%), price above VWAP-proxy 7122. GEX CONFIRM: rising pika FLOOR at 7125 (+12.9M, growing 1mΔ+0.6) directly beneath price = support; king pika MAGNET at 7150 (+26.7M) overhead with clean air / no wall between 7127-7150; positive-gamma regime supports an orderly grind toward the large king strike. Risk = lose 7125 floor / VWAP; target = drift to 7150 magnet.

CHART: breakout thesis dead — triple rejection at the 7128.5 day high, price back to 7123 on VWAP, momentum negative (5m -0.05%). GEX: the 7125 pika floor I entered on DISSOLVED — nearest floor now 7075 (48-pt air pocket beneath), net near-spot gamma fading +35M->+25M. Support structure gone; exit fast per method rather than hold a failed breakout into theta. Small loss.

CHART: confirmed breakout — price cleared the 7128-7130 ceiling that rejected 4x and is holding/extending to a fresh session high 7133.5, three consecutive green candles (7130->7132->7133.5), 15-min momentum accelerating to +0.17% (best of day), above VWAP. GEX CONFIRM: king pika MAGNET at 7150 (+37.4M and growing) with clean air 7133-7150; strong positive gamma (+70M) draws price toward the largest strike which now sits ABOVE; pika floor 7125 below as support. Target = 7150 magnet, cap the winner; risk = fall back below 7130 = failed breakout, exit.

CHART: grind stalled at 7138-7139, capped 11 pts short of target, momentum died (15m +0.15%->+0.04%, near flat); price frozen 2 candles at ~7139. GEX: net gamma pinned to an extreme +107M — the strong positive-gamma pin is suppressing further upside toward the 7150 king and will bleed 0DTE theta if held. Up ~5 pts from 7133.54 entry. CAP the 0DTE winner per method rather than wait for a magnet the pin is capping / risk a round-trip.
